pageContext.name: Itachi Uchiha
pageContext.description: TSUKUYOMI!   For the second statue in the Naruto Shippuden and Breach wall art line, Espada Art decided to create Itachi Uchiha with both his Mangekiyo and three tomoe Sharingan eyes that hover above his prey, trapping them within his Genjustu.  Itachi stands in front of a crimson moon as his Akatsuki cloak transforms into crows. He reaches out with one hand forward and his expressionless face.   This wall statue is created in 1:8 scale. Itachi, his crows, and Sharingan's interchangeable eyes will be made out of PVC and the crimson moon will be made of high-quality semi-translucent ABS and painted with multiple shades of red to add realism and simulate the light of the moon through an LED.
